title: WildFrontierr
description: WildFrontier is a wilderness survival & RPG adventure modpack for Fabric 1.21.1. Explore stunning terrain, battle bosses, level up your skills, and thrive in a dangerous world solo or with friends.
body:
🏜️ WildFrontier – Survive the Untamed World

WildFrontier is a wilderness survival & RPG-focused Fabric modpack that turns Minecraft into a dangerous, exciting frontier.
Explore vast landscapes, conquer dungeons, level up your skills, and battle powerful bosses — alone or with friends.

✨ Key Features

🌄 Immersive World Generation
Discover breathtaking biomes and terrain powered by Terralith and William Wythers’ Expanded Ecosphere.

🏹 RPG Progression & Combat
Unlock new abilities with LevelZ, battle with smooth animations thanks to Better Combat, and fight epic bosses with Adventurez & B.O.M.D..

🍲 Survival Depth
Master farming and cooking with Farmer’s Delight, manage resources carefully, and stay alive in dangerous terrain.

🗺️ Exploration & Loot
Search for structures with YUNG’s mods, collect unique loot with Lootr, and teleport to discovered Waystones.

🎒 Quality of Life Tweaks
Use Traveler’s Backpack for storage, Xaero’s Map for navigation, and REI for recipes.
